summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations planned. Security-sensitive PRs are quarantined item-by-item; non-security PRs are kept open for maintainer review or independent handling because merge, fix, and low-signal close actions are blocked by the job.

actions.reason: Unique open PR with no hydrated duplicate/canonical in this inventory shard; keep open for normal maintainer review.
Related to #92263, but this worker should not choose a canonical heartbeat PR from an inventory shard.
Quarantine this PR only; continue classifying unrelated non-security items.
Unique open PR with proof supplied; keep open for maintainer review rather than closing or merging in plan mode.
Related to another open tool-result truncation PR, but not enough inventory evidence to close or choose a canonical fix.
Keep open as its own release-branch/backport candidate; failing proof blocks merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout but not non-mutating classification.
Approval verification changes touch trust-boundary-shaped approval surfaces; route this PR to central OpenClaw security handling.
Exec approval interaction changes are approval-boundary-sensitive and explicitly quarantined by the preflight artifact.
Clean, proved, unique Nextcloud Talk mention parsing PR; keep open for maintainer review because merge is blocked in this job.
